mapper.select: SELECT * FROM restaurant rt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT restNo, reviewTitle, reviewContent FROM ( SELECT r1.restNo, r1.reviewTitle, r1.reviewContent, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r1.restNo ORDER BY r1.reviewNo DESC) AS rn FROM review r1 ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 ) rv ON rt.restNo = rv.restNo WHERE rt.latitude BETWEEN #{swLat} AND #{neLat} AND rt.longitude BETWEEN #{swLng} AND #{neLng}
mapper.insert:
SELECT restaurant_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
insert into restaurant values (#{restNo}, #{restName}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude})
